data.body: POST-CLOSE (test-quality pass, 813dd5c8): replaced the inspect.getsource 'no second interpreter' change-detector with a behavioral call-counting FunctionModel (exactly 1 model call for a repairable reply); de-tautologized the validity eval (added a genuinely-unrecoverable element + the false-accept arm asserts no fabrication); confirmed migrated-v1 validates against the real v2 schema. All green.
